hero_description: Yeh Beautician & Makeup Artist course aapko beauty industry mein entry level skills provide karega. Aapko basic skincare, hair removal, nail care aur everyday makeup techniques sikhaye jayenge, jisse aap ek confident beauty professional ban saken.
overview_description: Iss program mein aap hygiene practices, client consultation, facials, waxing, manicure, pedicure, aur party makeup jaise essential services mein hands-on training paayenge. Indian clients ki preferences aur market demands ko dhyan mein rakhte hue yeh course design kiya gaya hai.

modules.title: Fundamentals of Beauty & Salon Management
topics: Beauty Industry ka Introduction & Career Scope in India — Indian beauty market, jobs aur growth ke mauke.
Personal Grooming & Professional Etiquette — Kaise presentable dikhein aur clients se professional tareeke se baat karein.
Hygiene, Sanitation & Sterilization — Beauty tools aur workspace ko saaf aur germ-free kaise rakhein.
Salon Safety & First Aid Basics — Salon mein safety rules aur emergency situations ke liye basic first aid.
Client Consultation & Communication Skills — Client ki needs samajhna, unko services explain karna aur achhe se communicate karna.
Skin & Hair Anatomy ka Basic Gyaan — Skin types, hair growth cycle aur body parts ka fundamental knowledge.
Product Knowledge & Storage — Different beauty products ko pehchanna, unke uses aur unhe sahi se store karna.
Salon Environment & Workflow Management — Salon operations ko samajhna, appointments aur time manage karna.
Beauty Tools aur Equipment ka Use & Maintenance — Common beauty tools ko operate karna aur unki care karna.
Basic Customer Service & Client Retention Tips — Clients ko khush rakhna aur unhe wapas aane ke liye encourage karna.

modules.title: Skincare Basics & Facial Treatments
topics: Skin Types & Conditions ko Pehchanna — Oily, dry, combination, sensitive skin aur common skin problems (pimples, pigmentation).
Daily Skincare Routine & Product Selection — Cleansing, toning, moisturizing (CTM) ka importance aur sahi products chunna.
Basic Facial Steps: Cleansing, Toning, Exfoliation — Face ko saaf karna, dead skin hatana aur skin ko refresh karna.
Face Massage Techniques (Basic) — Blood circulation improve karna aur client ko relax karna.
Steam & Extraction ka Sahi Tareeka — Blackheads aur whiteheads ko safely aur hygienically remove karna.
Face Packs & Masks ka Application — Different skin types ke liye suitable face packs aur masks lagana.
Cleanup Facial (Normal Skin) ka Practical — Ghar par ya salon mein basic cleanup ka hands-on practice.
Fruit Facial (Dry/Dehydrated Skin) ka Practical — Natural ingredients se skin ko nourish aur hydrate karna.
Eye Care & Lip Care Treatments — Dark circles, puffy eyes aur chapped lips ke liye special care.
Aftercare Advice for Clients — Facial ke baad skin ki care kaise karein, iske liye clients ko guidance dena.

modules.title: Hair Removal Techniques
topics: Hair Growth Cycle & Types of Hair — Hair growth patterns aur body hair ke different types ko samajhna.
Threading (Eyebrows, Upper Lip, Forehead) ka Practical — Dhage se unwanted hair remove karne ki technique.
Waxing ka Introduction & Types (Hot, Cold, Rica) — Different types of wax aur unke specific uses.
Waxing Preparation & Aftercare — Skin ko wax ke liye ready karna aur waxing ke baad care tips.
Full Arm & Half Leg Waxing ka Practical — Hands-on practice for waxing arms aur legs.
Underarm & Stomach/Back Waxing ka Practical — Sensitive areas par waxing ki technique.
Bleaching ka Sahi Tareeka (Face & Body) — Hair ko lighten karne ke liye bleaching process.
Hygiene & Safety while Hair Removal — Hair removal ke dauran infections se bachne ke tareeke.
Ingrown Hair & Skin Irritation se Bachao — Waxing ke side effects ko prevent aur treat karna.
Client Comfort & Pain Management Tips — Hair removal ke dauran client ko comfortable feel karana.

modules.title: Hand & Foot Care (Manicure & Pedicure)
topics: Nail Anatomy & Common Nail Problems — Nails ki structure aur common nail infections/issues.
Manicure ka Sahi Tareeka (Classic Manicure) — Hands ko clean, shapely aur soft banane ki complete process.
Pedicure ka Sahi Tareeka (Classic Pedicure) — Feet ko clean, smooth aur fresh banane ki complete process.
Nail Shaping & Filing Techniques — Different nail shapes (square, oval, round) aur filing methods.
Cuticle Care & Nail Buffing — Cuticles ko safely push back karna aur nails ko shine karna.
Hand & Foot Massage Techniques — Relaxation aur blood circulation improve karne ke liye massage.
Nail Polish Application (Basic) — Perfect aur long-lasting nail polish lagane ka tareeka.
Basic Nail Art Designs (e.g., French, polka dots) — Simple aur attractive nail art designs banana.
Paraffin Wax Treatment (Hands & Feet) ka Introduction — Deep moisturizing aur relaxation ke liye paraffin wax.
Hygiene & Sterilization for Manicure/Pedicure Tools — Manicure aur pedicure tools ko saaf aur sterilize karna.

modules.title: Everyday & Party Makeup
topics: Makeup Products ka Introduction & Selection — Different makeup products (foundations, concealers, etc.) aur unhe chunna.
Makeup Tools & Brushes ka Use & Maintenance — Makeup brushes aur applicators ko use karna aur saaf rakhna.
Skin Preparation for Makeup: Cleansing, Toning, Moisturizing, Priming — Makeup se pehle skin ko ready karna.
Foundation & Concealer Application (Skin Tone Matching) — Perfect base makeup ke liye sahi shade chunna aur blend karna.
Basic Eye Makeup: Kajal, Eyeliner, Mascara — Everyday look ke liye essential eye makeup techniques.
Eyebrow Shaping & Filling — Eyebrows ko define aur fill karke face ko frame karna.
Lipstick Application & Lip Liner Techniques — Lips ko shape dena aur long-lasting lipstick lagana.
Blush & Bronzer Application — Face ko contour karna, blush se color dena aur bronzer se warmth add karna.
Day Makeup Look ka Practical — Simple, natural aur everyday use ke liye makeup look create karna.
Party Makeup Look ka Practical (Basic Smokey Eye/Glam Lips) — Special occasions ke liye thoda bold aur glamorous look.
Makeup Removal & Aftercare — Makeup ko sahi tareeke se remove karna aur skin ki care karna.
Client Consultation for Makeup Looks — Client ki preferences aur occasion ke hisab se makeup plan karna.

modules.title: Professional Development & Client Service
topics: Customer Service Excellence & Client Handling — Clients ko best experience dena aur unki needs ko samajhna.
Selling Skills for Beauty Products & Services — Clients ko suitable products aur services recommend karna.
Client Feedback & Complaint Management — Clients ka feedback lena aur complaints ko professionally handle karna.
Building Your Portfolio & Social Media Presence — Apne kaam ki photos aur videos se ek strong portfolio banana.
Pricing Your Services & Basic Billing — Apni services ka sahi price decide karna aur basic billing karna.
Career Opportunities in Beauty Industry — Beautician aur makeup artist ke roop mein career growth aur next steps.
Freelancing & Entrepreneurship ka Basic Gyaan — Apna business shuru karne aur freelance kaam karne ki fundamentals.
Continuous Learning & Skill Upgradation — Nayi techniques aur trends seekhte rehna.
Time Management & Salon Operations — Din bhar ke kaam ko efficiently manage karna.
Professional Ethics & Confidentiality — Clients ki privacy maintain karna aur professional standards follow karna.

assessment.practical_format: Candidates ko live models par di gayi beauty services perform karni hongi, jismein hygiene, technique aur client satisfaction par marks diye jayenge.

practical_items.title: Basic Facial & Threading
practical_items.description: Candidate ko ek live model par basic cleanup facial (cleansing, toning, exfoliation, steam, extraction) aur eyebrow & upper lip threading perform karna hoga.

practical_items.title: Manicure & Pedicure
practical_items.description: Candidate ko ek live model par classic manicure aur pedicure perform karna hoga, jismein nail shaping, cuticle care, massage aur basic nail polish application shamil hai.

practical_items.title: Party Makeup Look
practical_items.description: Candidate ko ek live model par skin prep, foundation, basic eye makeup (e.g., smokey eye ya defined eyes), blush aur lip application ke saath ek party makeup look create karna hoga.

eligibility: Already working? Apply for direct RPL exam
Valid ID proof required at registration
learning_outcomes: Basic salon hygiene, sanitation aur safety protocols ko samajhna aur follow karna.
Client consultation effectively perform karna aur unki needs ke according services recommend karna.
Basic facial treatments (cleanup, fruit facial) aur hair removal techniques (threading, waxing, bleaching) ko successfully perform karna.
Manicure aur pedicure services ko proper technique ke saath execute karna, jismein nail shaping aur basic nail art bhi shamil hai.
Everyday aur party makeup looks create karna, jismein skin prep, foundation, eye makeup aur lip application shamil hai.
Customer service skills develop karna, client feedback handle karna aur career growth ke liye basic entrepreneurial steps samajhna.
